title: Aux yeux du souvenir
writer: Jean Delannoy, Henri Jeanson, Georges Neveux
actors: Michèle Morgan, Jean Marais, Jean Chevrier
plot: A small private airplane crashes in the desert, not far from Dakar. It is a miracle that the pilot, Jacques Forestier, and his mechanic, Paul Marcadout, survived, since both were drunk when they lost control of the plane.
